howItWorks.intro: This global conflict escalation risk index uses established formulas to provide accurate results.
rules: Global score = Ukraine(20%) + Middle East(25%) + Taiwan(20%) + Trade War(15%) + Nuclear(20%)
Each factor 1-10, weighted by severity and geographic scope
howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.question: Is global conflict risk higher now than usual?
faq.answer: By most metrics, yes. Multiple simultaneous conflicts (Ukraine, Middle East, Red Sea), great power competition (US-China-Russia), and nuclear saber-rattling create a risk environment not seen since the early 1980s Cold War peak.

faq.question: How accurate is this calculator?
faq.answer: This calculator uses standard geopolitics and energy markets formulas trusted by analysts and informed citizens. Results are reliable estimates for planning purposes. For critical decisions, we recommend consulting a qualified professional to verify.

faq.question: What ukraine/russia intensity should I enter?
faq.answer: Enter the most accurate ukraine/russia intensity value you have available. If you're estimating, use a conservative figure. You can always run the calculator again with different values to see how changes affect the results.

faq.question: Can I use this calculator on my phone?
faq.answer: Yes, the Global Conflict Escalation Risk Index is fully responsive and works on any device — phone, tablet, or desktop. No app download needed.

faq.question: What does global risk score mean in my results?
faq.answer: The global risk score value represents the primary output of the calculation based on your inputs. Use it as a baseline figure for your geopolitics and energy markets planning and decision-making.

sections.title: What Is the Global Conflict Escalation Risk Index?
sections.body: The Global Conflict Escalation Risk Index is a free online tool designed for analysts and informed citizens who need quick, accurate calculations in the geopolitics and energy markets space. By entering your ukraine/russia intensity, middle east intensity, taiwan strait tension, you get instant results including global risk score, risk category, financial market risk. No formulas to memorize, no spreadsheets to build — just enter your numbers and get the answer in seconds. Whether you're a beginner or experienced professional, this calculator saves you time and eliminates guesswork.

sections.title: Why This Calculation Matters
sections.body: Getting global risk score right can make the difference between success and costly mistakes. In geopolitics and energy markets, small errors compound quickly. Manual calculations are error-prone and time-consuming, especially under pressure. This calculator applies proven formulas used by analysts and informed citizens worldwide, giving you confidence that your numbers are correct. Use it to understand global dynamics with precision and avoid common pitfalls that trip up beginners.

sections.title: When Should You Use This Calculator?
sections.body: This tool is most useful when you know your ukraine/russia intensity and need to find the right global risk score. It's also great for quick estimates before committing to a decision, and to double-check manual calculations or professional quotes, and when comparing different scenarios side by side. Bookmark this page and come back whenever you need a fast, reliable answer — the calculator is always free and requires no signup.

howToSteps.title: Enter Your Ukraine/Russia Intensity (1-10)
howToSteps.description: Start by entering your ukraine/russia intensity — this is the primary input for the calculation.

howToSteps.title: Fill In Additional Details
howToSteps.description: Complete the remaining fields: middle east intensity, taiwan strait tension, trade war severity, nuclear threat level. Each value refines the calculation for greater accuracy.

howToSteps.title: Click Calculate
howToSteps.description: Hit the Calculate button to run the numbers. Results appear instantly below.

howToSteps.title: Review Your Results
howToSteps.description: Check your global risk score, risk category, financial market risk. Use these figures to inform your next decision or compare against alternative scenarios.

tips: Double-check your ukraine/russia intensity before calculating — even small input errors can significantly change your results.
Run the calculator with different values to compare scenarios and find the optimal approach for your situation.
Pay attention to both global risk score and risk category — they work together to give you the full picture.
Bookmark this page for quick access next time you need to understand global dynamics.
If you're unsure about your nuclear threat level, start with a conservative estimate and adjust from there.
